overview.description: The ProShares Short MSCI EAFE (EFZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE index. The fund provides daily inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index representing 85% of the market capitalization in developed markets excluding North America. EFZ was launched on Oct 23, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
